title: croton samarensis
intro: Croton samarensis, also known as the Sama tree or Sama croton, is a plant species native to the Philippines that belongs to the Euphorbiaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Croton samarensis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin conditions such as wounds, eczema, and acne. Herbal preparations of Croton samarensis include a decoction made from the roots and leaves, which can be used to treat various ailments.
